# Genuíno Investments Switzerland

> Swiss-managed luxury real estate firm developing and selling premium properties in Portugal. Offices in Carouge/Geneva (Switzerland) and Lumiar/Lisbon (Portugal). Serving international investors from Europe, China and the Middle East. Site available in Portuguese, English, French and German.

The site presents the company, its development portfolio (completed projects) and a live catalogue of properties currently for sale, with multilingual contact and investor information.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, featured properties and portfolio highlights.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, values and team.
- [Services](/services): Real estate development, management, sales and consulting services.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Completed real estate projects developed by Genuíno Investments in Portugal.
- [Properties](/properties): Properties currently for sale in Portugal (apartments, villas, premium investments).
- [Vision](/vision): Long-term vision for sustainable, timeless real estate development.
- [Investors](/investors): Investment opportunities, returns and the Swiss management approach.
- [Contact](/contact): Geneva HQ (+41 76 487 60 00) and Lisbon office (+351 21 758 06 73), email info@genuinoinvestments.ch.
- [Legal Notice](/legal): Legal terms of use.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Privacy and personal data protection.
- [Disputes](/disputes): Alternative dispute resolution.

## Optional

- [Install PWA](/install): Instructions to install the site as a Progressive Web App.
